title: encyclia livida
intro: Encyclia livida, also known as the Yellow Encyclia, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Encyclia. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows as an epiphyte on trees and other plants. The medicinal properties of Encyclia livida include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are said to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, improve respiratory health, and lower blood pressure, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
